view: next-cohort PREDICTED-only — Z=119/120 isotopes NOT scored by N11 (N11 G4 had 293/295-119 + 295/297-120). N12 sweeps the neutron-rich tail toward the predicted N≈184 island. Sibling of n11_funnel/.../top_k_novel.json (kept intact).

query.filter: predicted_input == true && NOT in N11 cohort

honest_skipped: Z=121, Z=122: NO cited numeric Q_alpha anywhere (arxiv:2402.11514 Skyrme table scope concludes at Z=120; research note §3 has none) → honest-skip (§3.3). Out-of-scope != impossible (@D d2); re-enter when a cited Q_alpha band exists.

N=183/184-region Z=119/120 (303-120, 304-120, 301/303-119): WS4 table in arxiv:1706.04068 reaches N=182 (302-120); N=184 cells have no cited Q_alpha in the source → honest-skip (no fabrication of the island-center Q_alpha).
rank_formula: composite = c_total_score (window score on C1 alpha+SF log10 T_total) x island_weight (2-D Gaussian magic-number proximity, sigma=6). Identical scorer to N11 G4 (n11_island_cell_checked).
verify_status: Closed-form kernels (NC1 Viola-Seaborg, NC2 Royer, C1 Ren-Xu/ZWP SF) reproduce U-238 (+17.45 vs +17.4) and Og-294 (-2.931 vs -2.93) anchors VERBATIM via test/nuclear_r4_anchor_smoke.hexa (4/4 PASS, run on pool mini 2026-05-28). The same kernels were prior-registered as 2/2 + SF-trio 🟢 SUPPORTED-NUMERICAL atoms (NUCLEAR.md §6.3 #960). `hexa verify --expr` re-registration BLOCKED this session: verify_cli.hexa fails to compile on pool mini at hexa-lang af645e419 (clang: '_bessel_j1' redeclaration, duplicate-symbol codegen bug — pre-existing, unrelated to N12 kernels). hexa-lang INBOX item: verify-CLI build broken at af645e419.

top_k_candidates.note: CLOSED-NEGATIVE (g63): even-even, SF-dominant (b_alpha=0.006), log10 T_total=-8.22 s falls BELOW the accelerator band -> c_total=0 -> composite=0. KEPT, not skipped. SF-collapse is an in-model PREDICTION (Ren-Xu valid for even-even Z=120), NOT 'cannot exist' (@D d2). High Q_alpha (13.308) drives the short half-life.

scope_caveats: (s1) PREDICTED-ONLY view: EVERY cell is predicted_input=true — a CITED Q_alpha from arxiv:1706.04068 (WS4 primary; KTUY05 where W4 unavailable), NOT measurement. This is sim-composed-with-sim (predicted Q_alpha -> semi-empirical T). '후보일 가능성' != '후보임' != '발견됨'.

(s2) Q_alpha is mass-model dependent (Delta Q_alpha ~0.3-1.0 MeV across FRDM/WS4/SkyHFB/KTUY/BSk; note §3.1). The 296-119/298-120 values are decay-chain-reconstructed WS4 (lower-confidence than even-even primary-table values). @D d6/d7: no forced number; only the cited model value is scored.

(s3) Many cells are odd-A/odd-odd carrying model_validity_flag=odd-A-hindrance-not-modeled or out-of-domain (G2/G2-edge). A low composite there is an honest hindrance-uncaptured signal, NOT a true SF collapse (the genuine CLOSED-NEGATIVE is 300-120 even-even, in-model SF-collapse). sf_model_invalid=true on 5 cells = Ren-Xu out-of-domain guard fired -> alpha-only total used as a PREDICTION (@D d2).

(s4) absorbed=false 영구 (R4). 2026-05 현재 Z=119/120 confirmed discovery 0건 (RIKEN/Berkeley/JINR 진행중/착수예정). This is an accelerator beam-time PRIORITY hint, never a discovery. (e)-gate detection (DGFRS-2/GARIS-III recoil-separator) is permanently wet-lab-dependent.
citations: arxiv:1706.04068 — Alpha decay of nuclei interesting for synthesis of Z=119,120 isotopes (WS4 + KTUY05 Q_alpha tables; AKRA/ASAF/UNIV/semFIS half-life models)

arxiv:2402.11514 — High-Quality Microscopic Nuclear Masses of SHE (Skyrme functional Q_alpha; reproduces measured alpha-energies within 0.2 MeV; scope concludes at Z=120 -> Z=121/122 honest-skip confirmed)
arxiv:2506.02684 — Deformed magic N=178, Z=120,124 (Skyrme MF) — basis for the 298-120 deformed-magic candidate
arxiv:2601.21317 — Competing decay modes & stability of Z=120 (RMF/NL3, PCM)
Viola-Seaborg 1966 (NC1) · Royer 2000 (NC2) · Ren-Xu PRC71 014309 2005 + Hoffman 1993 + Zdeb-Warda-Pomorski 2013 (C1/C3/C4 SF kernels)
recommendation: N12 next-cohort accelerator beam-time priority shortlist — Z=119/120 isotopes NOT covered by N11. TOP: 298-120 (composite 0.545, deformed-magic N=178, alpha-dominant) > 296-119 (0.492). Both OUT-RANK the entire N11 G4 novel cohort (N11 top 295-119 = 0.046) because their lower Q_alpha lands T1/2 inside the accelerator band. The highest island_weight cell is 302-120 (0.946, N=182 nearest the predicted N=184). 300-120 = CLOSED-NEGATIVE (composite=0, in-model SF-collapse). absorbed=true requires GSI/JINR/RIKEN beam + SHIP/DGFRS/GARIS detection + IUPAC priority — none from sim. '가능성' != '임'.
